description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named PS4 that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to master, and on published releases, excluding changes to markdown files. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-22.04 environment with a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. It should check out the repository, create a build environment with necessary dependencies, build the project using a bash script, and upload the package as an artifact or to a release.
